title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Big Mom, Unknown person #10, Chopper, Brook, Unknown person #11 as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: I can feel Napoleon's thought waves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know which way we're going because you went back to eat a wildlife!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who was it that damaged me enough to have to do that, Zeus?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You let one of the enemies use you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're special; we're one of the only homies born directly from my Mama's soul!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next time you try to betray Mama over some food, I won't forgive you!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're being swept away by the waves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm losing conscious- mess! I've gotta stop soon. How many ships are left?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Miss Carrot! I know I'm not much,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I managed to put that ship over there to sleep!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are you going to return to normal?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I hide my eyes from the moonlight... HAA... HAA... I'll be able to switch back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can use a hat or colored glasses... I can even just close my eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The light of the full moon uplifts us.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: It truly was beautiful to behold. Yohoho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Brother Peros! Brother Dalfuku is done for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His battle- ships are being pushed aside by the waves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you, Carrot. We made it out of that big pinch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ehehe... can I go into a room that doesn't have a view of the moon?:)

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: ZEUS! Prometheus! Are you here yet?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
